title: Patient Journey
description: The Patient Journey view traces an individual patient’s clinical trajectory through the ICU stay. Review admission events, interventions, vital signs, lab results, and clinical notes in a unified timeline.
tips: Scroll the timeline to navigate through the patient’s hospitalization from admission to discharge.
Click any event to expand its clinical details, including documented values and the recording clinician.
Lab result panels show trends over time with reference range indicators for quick interpretation.
Use the filter bar to focus on specific event types such as medications, procedures, or imaging studies.
